description: Privacy-first, unofficial Fitbit MCP server for AI health, sleep, activity and heart-rate agents.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/fitbitmcp

environmentVariables.description: Fitbit OAuth client ID. Optional when configured with fitbit-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Fitbit OAuth client secret. Prefer fitbit-mcp-server setup so this secret is stored in ~/.fitbit-mcp/config.json instead of MCP client config.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Redirect URI configured in the Fitbit Developer Dashboard. Optional when configured with fitbit-mcp-server setup.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.fitbit-mcp/tokens.json.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full Fitbit API payloads, not continuous 24/7 raw sensor telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.fitbit-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_CACHE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to bypass the in-memory HTTP response cache (60s TTL for GET only). POST/PUT/DELETE and 4xx/5xx responses are never cached regardless.
environmentVariables.name: FITBIT_NO_CACHE
